homepage.heroSubline: Preserving Bay Area homes with quality window replacement and repair. Expert craftsmanship, lasting results.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Bay Area Window Expertise
aboutText: North Beach Sash & Window Supply was founded on a simple principle: provide San Francisco residents with durable, beautiful windows that stand up to the city's unique climate. We're a family-owned business, born and raised right here in the Bay Area.

We believe in doing things the right way, even when it's the harder way. That means using premium materials, employing skilled craftsmen, and paying meticulous attention to detail on every project. We treat every home as if it were our own.

We're proud to be a part of the San Francisco community. We actively support local initiatives and organizations that work to improve the lives of our neighbors. When you choose us, you're supporting a business committed to the city.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and experience the difference quality makes.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with energy-efficient, beautiful new windows.
services.description:
Replacing your windows is a significant investment that can dramatically improve your home's comfort, energy efficiency, and curb appeal. At North Beach Sash & Window Supply, we offer a wide selection of window styles and materials to suit any home and budget. From classic double-hung windows to modern casement and awning styles, we have the perfect solution for your needs.

Our experienced team will handle every aspect of the window replacement process, from initial consultation and precise measurements to expert installation and meticulous cleanup. We understand the nuances of San Francisco architecture and will ensure that your new windows seamlessly integrate with your home's existing style. We work with all types of homes from Victorians in Pacific Heights to modern condos in SOMA, and understand how to navigate the unique challenges that each presents.

We prioritize using high-quality, energy-efficient windows that meet or exceed industry standards. This means lower energy bills, improved insulation, and reduced noise pollution. We'll help you choose the right windows to maximize your home's performance and value.
process: Step 1: Consultation and measurement
Step 2: Window selection and ordering
Step 3: Old window removal
Step 4: New window installation and sealing

faq.question: How long does window replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project, but most replacements can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: What types of windows do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of window styles, including double-hung, casement, awning, sliding, and picture windows, in materials like wood, vinyl, and aluminum.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your window replacement project more affordable.

services.name: Window Repair
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your existing windows with expert repair services.
services.description:
Don't replace your windows if you don't have to. North Beach Sash & Window Supply offers comprehensive window repair services to restore your existing windows to their former glory. We specialize in repairing all types of windows, including wood, vinyl, and aluminum frames. Bay Area weather can be hard on windows, so we will work to extend the life of your windows.

Our skilled technicians can address a wide range of window problems, including broken glass, damaged frames, faulty hardware, and air leaks. We use high-quality replacement parts and proven repair techniques to ensure lasting results. We understand the unique challenges of repairing older windows and have the expertise to preserve their original character.

Repairing your windows is a cost-effective way to improve your home's energy efficiency, comfort, and appearance. It can also prevent further damage and extend the lifespan of your windows. Whether you have a single broken window or multiple windows in need of repair, we're here to help.
process: Step 1: Window inspection and assessment
Step 2: Repair plan and cost estimate
Step 3: Window repair and restoration
Step 4: Quality control and cleanup

faq.question: What types of window repairs do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of window repairs, including glass replacement, frame repair, hardware replacement, and weather stripping replacement.

faq.question: How much does window repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of window repair depends on the type and extent of the damage. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate cost assessment.

faq.question: Can you repair old or historic windows?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in repairing and restoring old and historic windows, preserving their original character and charm.

services.name: Foggy Glass Repair
services.shortDescription: Restore clarity to your windows with our foggy glass repair services.
services.description:
Foggy or cloudy glass is a common problem in double-pane windows. It occurs when the seal between the panes fails, allowing moisture to enter and condense on the glass surface. This not only obstructs your view but also reduces your window's energy efficiency.

North Beach Sash & Window Supply offers a cost-effective solution to foggy glass: glass replacement. This involves replacing only the glass unit, rather than the entire window, saving you money and hassle. Our experienced technicians will carefully remove the damaged glass and install a new, high-quality insulated glass unit.

We use advanced sealing techniques to ensure a long-lasting, airtight seal. This will prevent future condensation and keep your windows looking clear and beautiful. With our foggy glass repair services, you can restore your windows to their original clarity and enjoy unobstructed views of the Bay Area.
process: Step 1: Inspection of the foggy glass
Step 2: Measurement and ordering of replacement glass
Step 3: Removal of the old glass unit
Step 4: Installation of the new glass unit and sealing

faq.question: What causes foggy glass in windows?
faq.answer: Foggy glass is caused by a broken seal between the panes of glass, which allows moisture to enter and condense.

faq.question: Is it better to repair or replace foggy windows?
faq.answer: Repairing foggy glass by replacing the glass unit is often a more cost-effective option than replacing the entire window.

faq.question: How long does foggy glass repair take?
faq.answer: Foggy glass repair typically takes 1-2 hours per window, depending on the size and complexity.

services.name: Window Weatherization
services.shortDescription: Seal out drafts and save energy with our professional window weatherization services.
services.description:
San Francisco's cool, damp climate can take a toll on your windows, leading to drafts, air leaks, and higher energy bills. North Beach Sash & Window Supply offers comprehensive window weatherization services to help you seal out the elements and save money.

Our experienced technicians will inspect your windows for gaps, cracks, and other sources of air leaks. We'll then apply weather stripping, caulk, and other sealing materials to create a tight, airtight seal. We use high-quality, weather-resistant materials that are designed to withstand the Bay Area's unique climate conditions.

Window weatherization is a simple and cost-effective way to improve your home's energy efficiency, comfort, and indoor air quality. It can also reduce noise pollution and prevent moisture damage. Keep the fog and wind outside, and the warmth inside.
process: Step 1: Window inspection for air leaks
Step 2: Application of weather stripping and caulk
Step 3: Sealing of gaps and cracks
Step 4: Quality control and testing

faq.question: What is window weatherization?
faq.answer: Window weatherization is the process of sealing windows to prevent air leaks and improve energy efficiency.

faq.question: How much does window weatherization cost?
faq.answer: The cost of window weatherization depends on the number of windows and the extent of the work required. We offer free estimates.

faq.question: How long does window weatherization last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, window weatherization can last for several years.

services.name: Custom Window Design
services.shortDescription: Create unique windows that reflect your style with our custom design services.
services.description:
Looking for windows that perfectly match your home's unique architecture and your personal style? North Beach Sash & Window Supply offers custom window design services to bring your vision to life. Whether you're renovating a historic Victorian or building a modern masterpiece, we can create windows that are tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

Our experienced designers will work closely with you to understand your vision and create a window design that meets your exact specifications. We offer a wide range of design options, including custom shapes, sizes, materials, and finishes. We can also incorporate unique features such as decorative glass, custom hardware, and special coatings.

With our custom window design services, you can create windows that are not only beautiful but also functional and energy-efficient. We use high-quality materials and advanced manufacturing techniques to ensure that your custom windows are built to last.
process: Step 1: Consultation and design development
Step 2: Material selection and specification
Step 3: Manufacturing and fabrication
Step 4: Installation and finishing

faq.question: What is involved in custom window design?
faq.answer: Custom window design involves working with a designer to create windows that are tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

faq.question: What types of custom window designs do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of custom window designs, including custom shapes, sizes, materials, and finishes.

faq.question: How much does custom window design cost?
faq.answer: The cost of custom window design depends on the complexity of the design and the materials used. We offer free consultations.

services.name: Historic Window Restoration
services.shortDescription: Preserve the beauty and integrity of your historic windows with our restoration services.
services.description:
San Francisco is full of beautiful, historic homes. North Beach Sash & Window Supply specializes in historic window restoration. We understand the importance of preserving the original character and charm of these windows while also improving their energy efficiency and functionality.

Our skilled craftsmen have extensive experience working with historic windows of all types. We use traditional techniques and materials to restore your windows to their former glory. We can repair damaged frames, replace broken glass, restore original hardware, and re-glaze windows to create a tight, airtight seal.

We understand the unique challenges of working with historic windows and take great care to ensure that our restoration work is both historically accurate and durable. With our historic window restoration services, you can preserve the beauty and integrity of your historic home for generations to come.
process: Step 1: Detailed assessment of existing windows
Step 2: Careful removal and cleaning of window components
Step 3: Repair and restoration of frames and sashes
Step 4: Re-glazing and weather stripping for energy efficiency

faq.question: Why is historic window restoration important?
faq.answer: Historic window restoration preserves the original character and charm of your home while also improving its energy efficiency and functionality.

faq.question: What types of historic windows can you restore?
faq.answer: We can restore all types of historic windows, including wood, sash, and casement windows.

faq.question: How long does historic window restoration take?
faq.answer: The duration of historic window restoration depends on the condition of the windows and the extent of the work required. We provide detailed estimates.

serviceAreas.content:
North Beach Sash & Window Supply is proud to offer our comprehensive window replacement and installation services to the residents and businesses of San Francisco. We understand the unique architectural styles and weather conditions that characterize this vibrant city, and we tailor our solutions to meet your specific needs. From historic Victorians to modern condos, we have the expertise to enhance the beauty, energy efficiency, and value of your property with high-quality windows.

Our team of experienced professionals is committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and customer service. We offer a wide selection of window styles, materials, and finishes to complement any aesthetic. Whether you're looking to replace a single window or upgrade your entire home, we'll work closely with you to find the perfect solution that fits your budget and preferences. We are committed to keeping your home warm and dry, and our windows are installed to the highest standards to ensure a perfect fit and lasting performance. 

We take pride in being a part of the San Francisco community and are dedicated to contributing to its continued success. We understand the importance of preserving the city's unique character and are committed to using sustainable practices in our work.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Francisco, known for its iconic landmarks like the Golden Gate Bridge and its diverse neighborhoods, presents unique challenges and opportunities for window replacement due to its varied climate and architectural styles. We understand the importance of preserving the historic charm while improving energy efficiency.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: We replaced all the windows in our Victorian in the Mission District. The team was professional, efficient, and respectful of our home. The new windows look amazing and have made a huge difference in the comfort of our house. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had a cracked window pane and North Beach Sash & Window Supply repaired it quickly and affordably. The technician was knowledgeable and friendly. Will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: Our living room windows were so foggy, we could barely see out. North Beach Sash & Window Supply replaced the glass and now they're crystal clear. The difference is night and day!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: We had a terrible draft coming from our windows. North Beach Sash & Window Supply weatherized them and now our house is so much warmer. Our heating bills have gone down significantly!

reviews.name: Jennifer A.
reviews.text: Working with North Beach Sash & Window Supply on my custom window design was a fantastic experience. They listened to my ideas and created windows that are exactly what I wanted. The quality is outstanding!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: They carefully restored the original windows in my 1920s home, preserving their historic charm while improving their energy efficiency. I am very pleased with the results.
